HP: 100
Armor: 0
Healing...
Alive: 50
Kills: 0
Fists
OUTSIDE THE ZONE!

GAME OVER

×
🎒 BACKPACK
Drag items to organize | Drop outside to discard | Press [TAB] or [I] to close

BATTLE ROYALE

Last One Standing
Click to jump from the plane and choose your landing spot!
WASD - Move  |  Mouse - Aim  |  Click - Shoot / Punch Crates
E - Open/Close Doors & Pick Up Loot  |  1/2/3 - Switch Weapons  |  R - Reload
F - Melee Punch  |  G - Throw Grenade  |  B - Use Bandage
Body Parts: Shots hit random body parts! Head/Chest = critical  |  Legs = slow  |  Arms = can't shoot
Bleeding drains HP every 10s - use Bandage [B] or Medkit to stop
Armor Levels: Lv1/Lv2/Lv3 - higher = more protection
Wooden Crates - Punch open  |  Metal Crates - Need Crowbar  |  Flare Gun - Calls in an Airdrop with premium loot!
Backpacks - Higher level = more inventory space (Lv0: 20 slots, Lv3: 56 slots)
Grenades - Max 9 in grenade slot | Items take 1-15 slots based on size
Each gun uses its own ammo type!
